steps.title: Translate the first game
steps.content:
Each coin is worth $c$ points and each star is worth $s$ points. For $18$ coins, $9$ stars, and $576$ total points, the equation is
$$18c+9s=576$$

steps.title: Translate the second game
steps.content:
For $23$ coins, $11$ stars, and $716$ total points, the equation is
$$23c+11s=716$$

steps.title: Match the system
steps.content:
The system must keep coins with $c$, stars with $s$, and total scores on the right.
$$18c+9s=576$$
$$23c+11s=716$$
The answer is B.
